items.title: IBRX Stokes Retail Chatter — Investors See Anktiva Beat Merck’s Keytruda With Approval In EU
items.description: Retail investors are now looking forward to a full approval of Anktiva in the EU for BCG-unresponsive non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) with ...

items.title: Lowe’s To Reportedly Lay Off 600 Corporate And Support Jobs Amid Strategic Pivot
items.description: According to a report from the Wall Street Journal from Friday, the cuts will help the company focus on its store employees.

items.title: US Not On Path To Get Inflation Back To 2% and Rate Cuts Depends On Lower Inflation, Fed’s Goolsbee Says
items.description: Goolsbee said that inflation is stuck at 3% and that’s not acceptable.

items.title: Werewolf Therapeutics Stock Rises Over 5% After Hours On Workforce Reduction, Including Executives
items.description: The company said that the decision to layoff 64% of its workforce was approved by its board of directions on Feb. 9.

items.title: CLF Stock Garners Retail Attention Amid CEO Share Dump, Tariff Uncertainty
items.description: An SEC filing from Feb. 11 revealed that CEO Lourenco Goncalves had sold 3 million shares of Cleveland-Cliffs for about $12.42 each.
